steps.title: Test both inequalities
steps.content:
A solution must satisfy both inequalities:
$$
y\leq 2x
$$
and
$$
y\leq -2x
$$

steps.title: Check the matching pair
steps.content:
For $(0,-2)$, substitute $x=0$ and $y=-2$:
$$
-2\leq 2(0)
$$
and
$$
-2\leq -2(0)
$$
Both simplify to $-2\leq 0$, which is true.

steps.title: Match the solution
steps.content: The ordered pair $(0,-2)$ is Choice D. The answer is D.
